mechanics.excerpt: EQUIPMENT MIBCELLANEOUB EOUIPMENT Disgulse / Make-up Klt This includes all of the basic materials make-up artist needs to create prosthetic pieces ad wigs Attempts t0 dis- guise someone as specific person are impossible without such kit: Making disguise that simply alters character' appearance easier, and the kit gives 2 Modifier to the TN of such Disguise Skill Check. The kit includes enough supplies create four disguises before needs t0 be replenished at cost of 250 C-bills_ Lock Plcks Lock picks have come ong way over the years.
